series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of the file is to provide a record of the issuance of orders by the Chief to strip mine operators of disapproval of strip mine amendments, disapproval of strip mine reclamation, delinquent reclamation, revocation of licenses, order progress maps, modification of Notice of Violation of Chief''''''''''''''''s Orders and non-compliance with Notice of Violation or Chief''''''''''''''''s Orders and non-compliance with Notice of Violation or Chief''''''''''''''''s Order. (b) The file contains a copy of each Chief''''''''''''''''s Order filed numerically.
